name: Jonathan Jackson
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $27,983 for Jonathan Jackson in U.S. House, IL-01. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
